name: Pumpkin Delight
recipeIngredient: Diet Margarine (melted)           1/4 cup Brown Sugar Twin Packets
100% Pure Pumpkin                 2 packets Sugar-Free Instant Pudding Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Place whole graham crackers in a 13 X 9-inch baking pan.
2. Melt the diet margarine and brush over the crackers evenly.
3. In a bowl, beat the lite cream cheese with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Mix the spices (nutmeg, cinnamon, cloves, allspice) with the pure pumpkin in a separate bowl.
5. Add the pumpkin mixture to the cream cheese.
6. Stir in the brown sugar twin packets and the instant pudding mix until combined.
7. Beat in the skim milk until well blended.
8. Gently fold in the lite cool whip.
9. Pour the batter over the crackers in the pan, spreading evenly.
10. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
(from: Lori Norman)
